description: The fixture has no top-level `permissions:` block and one `curl ... | sh` step, so the scanner is expected to fire on both rules. Known residual FP: the regex-only `gha-no-curl-pipe-bash` pass also matches the `# 'curl ... | sh'` and `# 'curl-pipe-sh'` comment lines (lines 1 and 5). The duplicate is tracked but not added here because it is a scanner-side miss, not a legitimate finding.
